title: Create: Klinks n' Klangs
description: A compatibility mod for Cobblemon and Create
body:
This is a compatibilty mod for Cobblemon that allows you to automate better with Create. 

![All the Cobblemon Potions,Heals,and Vitamins have been given fluids and can mix, fill, and empty.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6171deef8fbc5aa70704d4a30360ceade6e59b02.png)


What we have:

Cobblemon Potions - Brew and bottle all of the medicine in Cobblemon, the Create way!

Cobblemon Vitamins - Mix up the vitamins your Mons need in bulk, and bottle them in style.

Pokeball Assembly - Setup a large-scale Pokeball factory with a fresh and interesting take on how pokeballs should be crafted and assembled. Create blank balls, apply a stencil via deployer and finish with paint. All recipes are in JEI.

Cobblemon and Beginner Friendly - I made sure every crafting process shows up in JEI, and that no original Cobblemon recipes were disabled to make sure you can follow along, and play your way. 


This mod was mainly something I wanted to build for my friends and I, as there wasn't any alternatives that supported the Cobblemon Potions. It is the first mod I have made ever, and I hope you can enjoy it as much as I am. 


Huge thanks to the Cobblemon Team! I appreciate everything they do, and they do it well. 

https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon

For the moment this is Forge only, until I can look into how difficult it would be to get it on Fabric. I will be sure to make this discription nicer and upload photos in the near future.
